name: Chicken Breasts Milano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine olive or vegetable oil, white wine, crushed garlic, chopped parsley, crumbled oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Place the chicken breasts in a shallow pan and pour the marinade over them. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade and reserve it. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
4. Arrange the chicken breasts, skin-side up, in one or two roasting pans. Do not crowd the pans.
5. Brush the chicken with some of the reserved marinade.
6. Bake the chicken at 375°F (190°C) for about 40 minutes, basting occasionally until the skin is crisp.
7. Sprinkle part of the Parmesan cheese over the chicken and return to the oven just until the Parmesan turns golden.
8. Preheat a serving platter with steamed spinach leaves, then hot cooked rice. Arrange the chicken breasts on top and sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese.
9. Garnish with red bell pepper strips. Serve immediately.
Makes 8 servings.
